summary.goal: Implement JWT-based user authentication with refresh tokens

context.conversation_summary: Conversation with 24 messages (12 user, 12 assistant). Main topics: authentication, JWT, security, middleware.

decisions.decision: Use JWT for authentication instead of sessions
decisions.rationale: Better for mobile apps and stateless architecture

decisions.decision: Store refresh tokens in httpOnly cookies
decisions.rationale: More secure than localStorage for XSS protection

learnings: Bcrypt with 12 rounds provides good security/performance balance
The project uses Bun as runtime, not Node.js
Existing auth middleware uses cookies for session management
assumptions: Users will have modern browsers supporting httpOnly cookies
The frontend will handle token refresh automatically
Rate limiting will be implemented at a later stage

modified.summary: Added login and logout functions with JWT generation

key_messages.content: I need to implement user authentication with JWT. Can you help me set this up?
I'll help you implement JWT authentication. Let me first check your project structure and existing dependencies.
I also need refresh tokens for better security
I'll implement both access tokens and refresh tokens. The access tokens will be short-lived (15 minutes) and refresh tokens will be stored in httpOnly cookies for security.
